ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_titles" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game title */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the video game */,
  "release_date" INTEGER /* Release year of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who worked on the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the game */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_titles_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES game_developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearms" (
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm */,
  "firearm_name" TEXT /* Name of the firearm model */,
  "firearm_type" TEXT /* Type of firearm (e.g., assault rifle, handgun) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the firearm */,
  "caliber" TEXT /* Caliber of the firearm */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the firearm was manufactured */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the firearm was introduced */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the firearm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_firearms" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game title */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm used in the game */,
  "as" TEXT /* Alternative name or variation of the firearm in the game */,
  "character" TEXT /* Character using the firearm in the game */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the firearm in the game */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* How many times the firearm is used in the game */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* First game or level where the firearm appears */,
  "last_appearance" TEXT /* Last game or level where the firearm appears */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "firearm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_firearms_character FOREIGN KEY ("character") REFERENCES characters ("character_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_type" TEXT /* Type of character (e.g., protagonist, antagonist) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the character (e.g., human, alien) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the character (e.g., military, resistance) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_game_titles" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game title */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game title or firearm */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game title being accessed */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game title or firearm was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_firearm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_id") REFERENCES firearms ("firearm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_titles ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., lead developer, QA tester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the developer account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the developer's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the developer's account (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_game_titles" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game title */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id", "game_id")
)
